reviews.review_description: The new update makes gun handling better, makes the guns more realistic, and the new pump shotgun is probably the best shotgun you will find in any VR game. Plus, the missions are better, because of how they added more people and made the scenery more realistic. All in all, this update made the game 10 times better.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🙌

It means a lot to us to hear that you're enjoying the update. We've put a huge amount of work into it, so seeing feedback like this makes it all worthwhile 😄

Thanks for playing and for taking the time to leave a review😄

reviews.review_description: All of the issues I had previously were resolved with this update. The gun handling is way more realistic, the environment is way more immersive, there are 2 different paths to take which split the missions between the beach landing and paratroopers, and all in all I feel immersed like in Stalingrad. Great job.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🙌

Reading feedback like this makes all the hard work worth it !

Thank you for giving the game another chance and for taking the time to leave a review! 🫡

reviews.review_description: The update was great but I do have 1 complaint when the shotgun is held with two hands it is sideways and I have to twist my controllers to make it right side up, but the shotgun should not hold this game back from five stars I accidentally posted this review on the demo too. I didn’t realize it. ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the positive feedback! 

And thanks for pointing that out about the shotgun. We'll take a closer look at it and see what's going on there 

We're glad you enjoyed the update!

reviews.review_title: These devs need a bunch of respect
reviews.review_description:
I have had this game for a year now and it has completely changed with new weapons like the Lee enfield and geese gun and even decision making that is fantastic there is nothing wrong with my game and I love the v2 rocket at the shooting range when you shoot it.This game is perfection 






PS: I am a ww2 dday nerd who also has the Stalingrad one to and since I am British please can you maybe make a Dunkirk version.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 

Reading comments like this really means a lot to us after all the work that went into the Full Release update 😄

And as for future plans — we definitely encourage you to subscribe to our YouTube channel or join our Discord: www.dohvr.com/discord/

That’s where we’ll be announcing our future projects

reviews.review_description: Days of Heroes: D-Day is an impressive  experience that puts you right in the middle of one of history's most iconic battles. The graphics are detailed, the atmosphere is immersive, the weapons are easy to learn, I was pretty much invested from the start,  the missions provide a good balance of action and challenge, I kept losing time as I became so engrossed,  this is definitely worth adding to your library.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Great game, but I want to have a full body option and instead of just hands and the guns are fine I like the new update where you can be a paratrooper and go in tanks so Dev’s please read
I really want this to be in another update and add some new guns and pistols and can you make it a bit more realistic, please?

developer_response.body:
Thank you! We're really glad you're enjoying the update. 😄🫡

We actually tested a full body system, but unfortunately it didn't work very well with our low-poly art style, so we decided not to include it.

As for new weapons, we're currently working on the German D-Day DLC, and that's where you'll see some new guns being added. 😉👍

reviews.review_title: i'm giving it five stars BUT☝️🤨1 Thing
reviews.review_description: well i got an answer back on the first review i wrote but i should have put more on this to give the full scope of the problem i'm facing although you can set your gear however far away or how far up or down it still doesn't fix the problem that the gun sits too close to the ammo bag also you should make it to where each gun only knocks the clip out of the gun that the clip belongs to him because if i take a clip out and drop it to grab another one that clip falling not the clip from the secondary weapon out or if not just take out the mechanic that allows you to grab a clip and knock the other one out of the gun by tapping it completely off and out of the equation it's causing mechanical conflict problems also it seems that if you put a weapon into your primary weapon holster and you remove it it'll automatically jump back into your holster thus knocking the previous gun you put in it out if you drop the one you just took from your holster there that should be pretty detailed enough please fix one more thing i've noticed that there's an fg 42 weapon on this game yet it is not usable in the range i didn't even know the fg 42 was on this game until i got close enough to an enemy to grab it before it disappeared wish i can use that gun more in the game and on the range the fg 42 is a very versatile and pretty much devastating weapon that is fun to use

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5 stars! 

And we've got some good news — you can adjust the position of your equipment in the settings to make it more comfortable for you and better suited to the way you play

Thanks for the feedback and for giving the game a chance!

reviews.review_description: When I first got this game it was really fun but low budget which I didn’t mind at all it was still fun but when the update came the gameplay got a huge boost and it’s amazing when it first launched and I really recommend it it’s really fun with the decision making and guns can’t wait for another game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 😄

We're really happy to hear you enjoyed the Full Release update  😄

reviews.review_description: After that update you fixed all our problems and now we can feel what it is like to be a ww2 solider and when I said in my last review about saving private Ryan well I realised that that you’ve tooken scene out of that movie and put it the game which is amazing and there’s so many other things to mention like the guns and so many other things that I could say but I highly recommend  and it is a perfect game👌👌

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the positive review! 🙌

Comments like this genuinely mean a lot to us!

See you on the battlefield! 🫡

reviews.review_description: Not gonna lie, I was kinda disappointed………BEFORE the new update, it made such a better story, had more voice lines, made it fun and not bland like  it was, and I genuinely had to think for some parts, please in teh future add multiplayer, and limited ammo

developer_response.body:
Well, your timing couldn't have been better 😄

You asked for Limited Ammo Mode... and we literally just added it 😂

As for multiplayer, it's definitely something we'd like to explore in the future. 👍

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed this more than Stalingrad.
I prefer the setting more, but it also feels more refined and smoother.

I like the graphic style and the sounds are decent enough, but I did still find it tricky at times to reload, even after adjusting the position of the equipment belt ect..

I had an issue with radio handset on the beach, I died a few times before finally the crosshair would go to where I was looking (at the bunkers) rather that seem fixed to the barb wire.

But I did enjoy the immersion of the game, weapon accuracy is good and animations quite good.

Missions are a little short and there isn’t many of them, but what is here is good.

The airborne missions was cool and more open… loved the parachute jump at the start

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the detailed review and the 5 stars! 😊

Thanks as well for pointing out the radio issue on the beach — we'll take a look at it and see what's going on there. 👍

reviews.review_description:
The dev team are going above and beyond to make a superb world war game.
The campaign is just so good, first thing I did was jump out of a plane.
The goal is simple, kill everyone that is not on your side.
I absolutely loved Stalingrad and with these new updates this is just an incredible equal to that game.
Highly recommend this game for some arcade FPS shooting fun.
BRAVO TEAM.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! 

Comments like this make all those months of development worth it.

Thanks for playing, thanks for the 5 stars, and BRAVO to you for taking the time to leave such awesome feedback! 🎖️

reviews.review_description: Gladly paid full price when I saw they added full weapons mechanics. Unfortunately in the current state gripping and handling weapons and magazines is pretty bad. Random gripping causes awkward aiming/ gripping with thumb obscuring crosshairs. Grabbing mags from pouches/ loading and racking weapons is very inconsistent causing death frequently. Other issues are drifting hands in menu controls. There is a need to bring up current objective in game. I found myself getting lost on airborne assault not knowing where to find charges to destroy the guns. Got to the tank/ trench mission and it was unclear what I had to accomplish. Finally gave up. Still needs work and a lot of polish.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback 😄

A few quick notes:

Weapon gripping does not use forced hand positions. The system is designed to let players hold weapons however they find most comfortable. The grip isn't random — the weapon is held exactly where the player grabs it.

Regarding equipment handling, it's possible you missed the equipment adjustment step in the tutorial. Equipment placement can be customized at any time in the settings.

The chaos during the airborne mission is intentional and historically inspired. During the flight, your captain explains the objective, and once you're on the ground the anti-aircraft guns are highlighted with quest markers.

Thanks for giving the game a try and sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: Game felt clunky. Issues when holding the pistol with two hands and some glitches with the sniper rifle.  Also, the explosions are ridiculous. Every five seconds I felt like I was getting hit by a mortar. There is upside to this game such as the tank levels and some of the guns but overall it's really annoying when your hands glitch out from holding a pistol with two hands or you die every five seconds to nonstop mortars that spawn kill you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback.

The game has just received a major update, so it's still possible that some smaller issues have slipped through. We'll definitely take a closer look at the problems you mentioned.

If you have a moment, we'd love to learn more about the issues you encountered. Feel free to join our Discord: www.dohvr.com/discord/

reviews.review_description: As a ww2 nerd and someone who wants to join the military this hits all the points on the beach landing I was genuinely scared this is one of the greatest  ww2 games ever.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very, very much!
We're really glad you enjoyed the experience! 🫡

reviews.review_description: I love the full release, it's fun, immersive, and has loads of new content. When I found a bit of a bug, I left a review talking about it. A day later? Fixed. Very impressed. Definitely worth every cent.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🙌

And thank you for updating your rating to 5/5 — that genuinely means a lot to us ❤

reviews.review_description: I have Ben playing for since it came out in the update was crazy and I’m already on the seventh mission

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: This game was awesome to play. Sometimes it would get out of hand, but the game was good overall except for the lag for me. ￼

As for the lag, we're sorry to hear that. If you notice it happening in specific missions or situations, feel free to let us know — details like that are always helpful. (www.dohvr.com/discord/) 

Thanks for giving the game a chance!

reviews.review_title: Wonderful game but u need to do this
reviews.review_description: Great handling immersive great weapon physics and sound effects but u need to make explosions bigger louder and less acruate because during a mission just pushing one bit (on easy mode) i get killed by motars 7-18 times just pushing one bit,could u also make the game longer and can u let us chose our weapon before a match bewteen rifle sniper asualt rifle and machine gun but everything else is great

developer_response.body:
Thank you! 😄

We've already made some changes to the mortars and artillery, and those improvements will be included in an upcoming update.

As for choosing your weapon before a mission, that's actually a pretty interesting idea. We'll definitely give it some thought!

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome,the guns feel good and realistic,the enemies are hard,and the scenery is great W devs.Also although I know we will never get this update it would be cool to be on the Germans too.

And we actually have some good news for you — we're currently working on a German DLC campaign for D-Day! So you'll get the chance to experience the war from the German side as well. 😉

reviews.review_description: first why are there full aoutmatic 88mm flak cannons fireing second why is it so hard too advance because of mortars they ruin the whole game or the dumb ai throwing greanades at the wall too kill me please add greanade indicator overall good story

developer_response.body:
We're planning to release one more small update with fixes and improvements. From what you're describing, it sounds like the mortars are your biggest issue, they have already been corrected.

As for the AI grenade situation, cases like the one you described should be fairly rare, but we'll keep an eye on it.

Glad you enjoyed the story, and thanks for giving the Full Release a try

reviews.review_description:
As you know guys what an fantastic game this is  and now more improvements but unfortunately when playing in sitting position i am still relatively smaler than the figures in the game i hope  you will remedy this in the same way you did in your game Days of Heroes stalingrad.i would be very greatful.. 
But this looks so good I will play the second game Days of Heroes stalingrade. and hope to go back to D Day when fixed.
For anyone concerned the programmers are still making improvements to this games and will add a hight meter so you can determine your hight
Can't wait to get back into this game  after such a while.
Thanks
David 😃

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, David, for the 5-star review and your kind words! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

We’re happy to confirm that the upcoming Days of Heroes: D-Day update will include player height adjustment, just like in Stalingrad, so the size issue you mentioned will be resolved there as well.

It means a lot to us that you’re looking forward to playing again after the update. Thank you for your continued support and trust — we truly appreciate it

reviews.review_description: This is a great game but like it's successor it needs a German campaign as well as the same control options as Days of Heroes: Stalingrad

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the suggestion and the kind words!

We’re currently working on a big update that will bring D-Day much closer to the quality and overall feel of Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, including improved controls and many other changes.

The main idea will stay the same — it will still focus on the American campaign — but a lot will change and improve with this update.
Thanks again for your feedback and support!

reviews.review_description:
This game offers a truly delightful experience with its humorous gameplay. I found myself chuckling frequently at the amusing scenarios and character interactions. While the overall experience is very enjoyable, some moments did feel a tad too straightforward. However, this simplicity did not detract from the overall fun factor. It's a charming title that provides plenty of laughs.

Edit 8-12-2025
When will this game update be released?😃

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words and the 4/5 rating! 😊 We’re really glad you enjoyed the game and its humor.

We’re currently working on a huge update, so the game will be getting a massive refresh very soon — we hope you’ll love the new content!

reviews.review_description: Even though it’s not supposed to be graphically realistic, just the fact that the gameplay is fun and it’s D-Day centered and you can do the beach landing, and all that stuff is really priceless cause there aren’t other games out there where you can do the D day landing, I’m also very excited for this update and what it will bring!!! The only thing I’d say is give a little more detailed to the beach landing (you can hop over the side of the boat, drown in the water, bullet splashes in the water, a little more smoke and haze in the atmosphere, more bullet effects when hitting the sand and other material, and maybe just make the beach a little longer overall instead of just two machine gun bunkers) other than that I’d say the other trench warfare is really fun!! ￼You guys have done pretty good with this game and I’m excited to see what the update brings!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words — comments like this really mean a lot to us ❤️
We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game and that the beach landing made such an impression.

We can share a small spoiler 😉
In the upcoming update, Omaha Beach will be longer, more will be happening on the beach, and the whole sequence will be fully voiced to make the experience even more immersive.

We’re putting a lot of work into this update and doing everything we can to live up to expectations.
Thanks again for the support — it gives us a huge amount of motivation!

reviews.review_description: This game is probably one of my favorite games and I love the npcs and how they are like stupid (not tryna be mean) but one time there was a tank shooting bullets and a npc walked right into the bullets and it was so funny it’s very realistic too and I just love it 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing 5-star review! 🙏
We’re really happy you enjoy the game — and yes, sometimes the NPCs can create some unintentionally funny moments 😄 We're already improving their behavior as part of the big upcoming update, so they should get a bit smarter soon!

Thanks again for playing — it means a lot to us! 💛

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing, even though the graphics weren't top notch, they made it up with functions,the only REAL thing I noticed was when you shot them, sometimes, you could shoot them 20 times more but they won't take damage until the end if the animation, other than that though, it is an amazing game, please do buy it, it is amazing!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing feedback — really glad you enjoyed it! 🙏🔥
If you liked this one, feel free to check out our newer game Days of Heroes: Stalingrad.

We’re also currently working on a huge D-Day overhaul that will modernize the game in a big way. Hope you’ll enjoy the updated version once it’s out! 💪

reviews.review_title: Hi developer, will you please read this?
reviews.review_description: Just wanted to say that I love your game and I love World War II. I also love that you did the D-Day but I do think you could make more D-Day and have like just one mission where that’s all you do and just try to conquer the Germans, but what will the update be like that is coming out and when will it come just asking?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so, so much for the positive comment and rating — that means everything to us! 

The upcoming update is a complete remaster of the game. Almost every mechanic is being rebuilt, we’re adding new weapons, new sounds, dialogues, and most of the existing missions have been expanded. We’ve also created several brand-new missions.

And the biggest surprise — after the update, you’ll be able to become a tank crew member in D-Day, just like in Stalingrad! 

As for the release date, we don’t want to give a specific one yet — we want to be 100% sure we can deliver on any date we promise. We’ll announce it closer to the release. We’re doing everything we can to make sure you won’t be disappointed! 🙂🔥

reviews.review_description:
I found this game so much fun and playing it all the time! Although, I do have some suggestions. First, I think the levels and games should be longer, as each one for me averaged like 5-10 minutes. Also, maybe some more points to duck or crawl like the other days of heroes game as it makes it more interactive. Lastly, the NPCs, especially the allies are really dumb and I’m more of a one man army. I know you’re working on a big update to this game, so hope some of these things will be thought about or changed.

5/5 stars

developer_response.body:
Yes, that’s right — we’re working on a huge update! 🙌

Thank you so much for the positive review and your constructive feedback. We’re doing everything we can to deliver an amazing experience with this update and really hope we’ll meet your expectations. Thanks again for playing and supporting us! 💪🔥

reviews.review_description: Outstanding as is, and I can’t wait for the major update!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 🙌 We really appreciate the support — and we can’t wait either! We promise we won’t disappoint! 💪

reviews.review_description: This game reminds me of how it was like back in WW2 and uh developers this game is great but you know what would be better multiplayer dude just imagine

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 5-star review! ❤️ We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game.

If you liked Days of Heroes: D-Day in its current form, we actually have two good pieces of news 😊
First, we recently released our newer game Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, which is more advanced and builds on everything we learned before.
Second, we’re currently working on a huge D-Day update — essentially a full remaster — and it will be released as a free update.

As for multiplayer: it’s definitely something we dream about and would love to tackle one day. We really hope it becomes possible in the future.

Thanks again for your support and imagination — comments like this keep us going! 💪

Thanks a lot for the 5/5! 🙌
We’re currently working on a major update, and a lot is going to change very soon. Stay tuned!

developer_response.body:

Right now we’re working on a full overhaul of the game — new mechanics, redesigned maps, new missions, dialogue, improved systems — basically a complete rebuild. We hope you’ll love the updated version when it’s out!

reviews.review_description: I love the game but the thing is I think the missions are to short and also the d-day missions you should connect all the d-day missions in one big mission with checkpoints

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback, we really appreciate it!

We actually agree with your suggestion — and we have some good news.
We’re currently working on a major update for D-Day, and Omaha Beach will be structured very much like you described: one large mission with checkpoints.

The way the missions are set up right now was mainly due to hardware performance limitations at the time. With the upcoming update, we’re able to push things much further.

Thanks again for your support and for sharing your ideas — it really helps us move in the right direction.
See you on the battlefield! 💪

reviews.review_description: Not at all what I expected, half of the missions are very short and boring, the npcs are very stupid, especially the friendly npcs, they can't even kill anyone, the enemy npcs can only go to the positions allocated for them, and some missions are not passable at all, for example, missions where the npcs have machine guns, and there are very few interesting missions, you can't pick up weapons from corpses, at the beginning of some missions you have to wait several minutes for the mission to start. This game is not worth 15 dollars.

developer_response.body: Since your review was posted, we have released a major update that includes a large amount of new content, improvements, and fixes. We’d love to invite you to give the game another try and see how it feels now.

I really enjoyed the game, even though the Steam version has more levels, like the last one where you fight about 5 or 6 bosses/field marshals. And yes, I bought both versions because... just because I can! What's the big deal?

Well deserved five stars!
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body: Wow, we really appreciate it and thank you for support! Thanks to people like you, the sequel is being created. Please join our Discord for more details https://dohvr.com/discord - Thanks for being with us :)

reviews.review_description: So I have this game and the stallengrad demo but y’all should make one on the Pacific front. Like who wouldn’t like to be banzi charged in this art style!

developer_response.body: That’s an awesome idea! Right now, after releasing Stalingrad, we’re working on an update for D-Day… and after that, who knows? 😉

reviews.review_description: I’ve had a lot of fun with this game. Made better than most for sure, but where is the sequel? Completely discontinued by meta. Which is very much, pushing me to a point of not wanting to play VR, as Meta can’t seem to keep games on the headset for more than a few years.  Getting very pathetic. I was excited to see the second one. Hopefully it’s still set to release. I was excited for this game. Literally the only thing in the coming soon section, I was excited for.

developer_response.body:
Absolutely, D‑Day had a tumultuous ride on Meta, but we’re back and stronger than ever! 💥 We’re currently developing Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, which will be launching on the Meta store very soon. After that, we’ll return to D‑Day with a massive update to make it even better.

Thanks so much for your positive feedback — it really means a lot! 🙌 We hear you and all the others voicing the same concerns. Join our Discord community here for the latest updates and to stay in touch: www.dohvr.com/discord/

Appreciate your support — VR’s not going anywhere, and neither are we! 🎖️

reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game, it’s a little short and there could be some improvements, like hopefully smarter, and more AI on the field at one time. It really shows during the Omaha mission, the Americans have like five guys at once, it could do with some more to make it realistic as possible. Also in the same mission, it would be helpful if you got the bangalores from somewhere (ex: a engineers body that’s near the see wall), it could’ve been just me because I’m a idiot but I spent like 5 minutes trying to find the bangalores until I realized you just go so and press a button. Other than that I think the games really great, it’s a little short for its price tag, but I do realize it’s in early access. I hope it can grow, love y’all’s work!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the detailed feedback and for the 5/5! 
We’re actually working right now on a complete rebuild of Days of Heroes: D-Day — literally everything is being reworked: weapon mechanics, sound, levels, and AI behavior.
The current version was originally built for Quest 1, which meant a lot of performance compromises — but the new one will take things to a whole new level. 💪

Thanks again for trusting us and for your support — we promise not to disappoint when the update drops!
In the meantime, feel free to check out our newer title Days of Heroes: Stalingrad and join our community on Discord 👉 www.dohvr.com/discord/

reviews.review_description:
Great game the ai could get some improvements but overall it’s good but in the level blood and sand it’s just to hard to snipe the people in the bunker and plus if I stick my head up a tiny bit they are all shooting me please change something about the machine gunners and sniping 
them
￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the feedback! 🙏
We’re currently hard at work on the next chapter — Days of Heroes: Stalingrad — but once that’s released, we’re planning a major update for D-Day, and your notes on AI is super helpful.
We’ll absolutely take this into account.

Feel free to join our community and share more thoughts with us directly on Discord:
👉 www.dohvr.com/discord/

Thanks again for playing and for taking the time to write! 🎖️

reviews.review_description: I love the game and the missions are pretty good and I love wwII history

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words! 
If you enjoyed this one, we’d love to invite you to try our newly released Days of Heroes: Stalingrad – hope you’ll have a great time there too! 💥🎮

reviews.review_description: The story is beautiful the game play is so fun and over all just a very very good game

You can also check out our second title — Days of Heroes: Stalingrad — and here’s some good news: we’re currently working on a huge update for D-Day, so the game will soon become even better 🔥

reviews.review_description: Pretty good game I like the blocky style and the graphics are pretty good

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! 🙌

reviews.review_title: A short and sweet WWII experience
reviews.review_description: I find the game to be a very fun WWII experience, though there are a few problems that can take me out of the experience. First of all the ring when you go out of your boundary can be very distracting during battles in the game. And the AI is not very smart and just run to its set position and fires randomly. And most importantly at least to me is how you can see the edge of the map pretty frequently in levels, which take me out of the game. But with all that said, this is still a really fun time. Although it’s short, it is a very fun time to defend the church, or take an attack the trenches, and even bomb tanks or wherever you please. And that isn’t even talking about the thrilling battle of Omaha beach, which is one of the best parts of the game. Even though you can finish the game in about an hour, it is a lot of fun playing all the levels. In conclusion, while it has its flaws, this is still a a fun little WWII experience.

developer_response.body: Since your review was posted, we have released a major update that includes a large amount of new content, improvements, and fixes. We’d love to invite you to give the game another try and see how it feels now.

reviews.review_description:
Overall, I think this I one of my favourite games on vr 
It has Great. visuals and audio mabe one of the best in ww2 games I have seen but it needs more levels I finished the game in under a hour Otherwis
An a amazing game 👍

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! 🙌 We're really glad you enjoyed it!
The game will soon get a second chapter – Stalingrad, and after its release, we’re planning to return to D-Day and significantly expand the project 🚀

If you're curious about why the game turned out the way it did or what’s coming next — we talk about it in more detail on our Discord: www.dohvr.com/discord/

reviews.review_description: Great game it’s one of my favorite games to play. But I would like it more if it had multiplayer such as co-op. I would really like to play with my friends.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review and your support. Yes, co-op is something that would definitely expand the game by a lot. However, there is still a lot to do before that and for now we are focusing on the next Days of Heroes: Stalingrad adventure, but D-Day will definitely receive updates after the release of the second part. For more information, please visit our Discord https://www.dohvr.com/discord

reviews.review_description: I like how similar this game is to WW2 plus it's just one of those WW2 shooters that even if you beat the game you just wanna play it again W game and I hope to see more from the game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your support! We're thrilled to hear you enjoy the game and want to keep playing. You’ll definitely see more—we're currently working on Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, bringing even more intense WW2 action!

Join our Discord to stay updated and share your thoughts: www.dohvr.com/discord

See you on the battlefield! 🎖️🔥

reviews.review_title: Some problems :/ but it is still fun ;)
reviews.review_description:
Number one: this game only has a few playable missions so you can complete it and when you do you can only choose a different difficulty.
Two: there are so many missions where you do  ABSOLUTELY nothing :( except for standing there or sitting and only shoot 1 or 2 people I have completed this game and I want more game modes and updates.

There are few upsides like: how there is different soldiers from the ally countries and it shows the regiments like paratrooper units :)



Bugs: the game has a few like how I can hardly grab my pistol.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the bittersweet comment! 🙂 We’re glad you’re enjoying the full game! Feel free to join our Discord: www.dohvr.com/discord to share your suggestions with us. 🚀

reviews.review_description: I played on the hardest mode. Additionally I beat the game in a hour. The ai doesn't shoot at you while moving, they run to the point assigned to them, then shoot. I wouldn't say it's worth 15$. Also when you're going through all the missions you're  thinking "wow this is alot" but it's not, most of them just being introduction scenes or very short. In conclusion, mid game, fun for new vr players, bad ai, short missions, not worth 15$.

developer_response.body: Since your review was posted, we have released a major update that includes a large amount of new content, improvements, and fixes. We’d love to invite you to give the game another try and see how it feels now.

reviews.review_description: The only bad part about this game is when it says. “Please return to the circle” or whatever. No hate on the game just please get rid of that part,

developer_response.body: We're currently working on the second part of the game, where this message won't be present. We're implementing a different system there, which we'll later bring to D-Day as well! 😊 Thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
I really like the gamefeel, you get instant flashbacks to the first cod games. And i definetly like it far more than the moh vr game just by design already.

sure it isnt the best graphics but that’s fine. 

One star less bc i think there’s still some room for QOL improvements:
some guns cant use slide at all times,
Id love to see a gunstock adjustment feature AND a virtual gunstock feature.

That aside id personally pay again for somekind of successor or dlc

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Yes we had planned a workbench for guns that all of players could adjust a gun it for their own preferences by setting stuff like gunstock, hold points and range of it or autoreload by weapon and much more - for sure there is a lot of space for new content. Maybe in future we will add it in some update so far we are glad Meta  granted acces to store for us so we can share our product. Thanks for your engagement and we are glad you have a good time :)

reviews.review_description: This game is great it is very high paced and action based there are several missions and enemies to fight against. The best 5 stars

reviews.review_title: The Poly Medal of Honor Allied AssaultVR
reviews.review_description:
This indi poly game is a fantastic game. 
With this studio you will revive D-Day like Medal of Honor Allied Assault (or wwii call of duty D-day) but with poly graphics and severals and varied chapters, where you will go in different transports, you will use many iconic weapons, you will be a sniper with slow motion if you bring your rifle closer to your sight... You can see the taste and effort to do something good.
I think it's the best game in length, variety and replayability with Poly aesthetics I've seen.
Incredible first game for a studio. keep it up🍺

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the incredible review! 🙏
We’re thrilled to hear you loved the poly aesthetics, varied chapters, iconic weapons, transports, and slow‑mo sniping—it’s exactly the experience we set out to create.

Right now, we’re hard at work on Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, where you’ll find even more diverse missions, weapons, and that signature poly style taken to the next level. Once Stalingrad is released, we’ll bring its improvements back into D‑Day as a free update.

If you’d like to stay in the loop or share ideas, come join us on Discord: 👉 www.dohvr.com/discord/

Thanks again for the support—cheers! 🍺

reviews.review_description: Good game…

developer_response.body: And the players are even better! Stay tuned for Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
The flare for the p-51 on the bunker level for hardcore seems to be missing but other than that, I think it’s really good but I’d like to be able to use the flame thrower on the bunker level :(

Also, there is a soldier in the d-day landing craft wearing a red beret, which was only used by airborne divisions in ww2.

reviews.review_description: If you like ww2 you will fall in love with this game and even if your not a fan of ww2 still play it as it to good to miss out on. It is the best ww2 story game I played since cod ww2

Right now we’re hard at work on Days of Heroes: Stalingrad, which expands on our narrative and gameplay. Once Stalingrad launches, we’ll roll its modernized mechanics and improvements back into D‑Day as a free update.

reviews.review_description:
You pay a fully released game (1.0) for 15€ and you will get:

No left handed mode (Belt setup and grabbing the gun),

Really bad sound effects,

Bad controller tracking (Really hard to pull the slide of the pistol or hold it in general).

I haven't even finished the tutorial, as I already know that I'll have no fun at all having to spend at least 10 seconds to pull the slide of my 1911 or missing every shot as the game doesn't like it if I hold the gun as a lefty. So there might be even more issues, but I won't play this game again anyway.

For 15€ and it being a 1.0 version, this is not worth it. Maybe 5€ would be fine for the story.

developer_response.body: Since your review was posted, we have released a major update that includes a large amount of new content, improvements, and fixes. We’d love to invite you to give the game another try and see how it feels now.

reviews.review_description: This game.its a game that is short summarized war interactions. in my opinion this game is repetitive, the gun reload is janky the enemy NPCs only go for the player,the missions are not that intimate like you don't feel like your there manly because it's not loud enough and story feels plain like it's the same thing over and over your just killing people by shooting at them like there could've been at least been story dialogue.but putting all that aside the game is ok I mean the gun fights are still good and NPC teem work is fun and probably the thing that hasn't made this game die is the fact that there's tiny things scattered around the missions that make it fun.but in my opinion not that great and I would like a refund if that's possible
